hook: People feel seen when you respond to what they actually said rather than just waiting for your turn to perform.
body: Attention is one of the strongest social signals because it tells the other person they are affecting you in real time.

hook: Men often prepare their next impressive move while missing the exact thread that could have made the conversation intimate.
body: Depth usually begins with better listening before it becomes better talking.

body: Following the emotional texture of her answer often leads somewhere richer than jumping back to your prepared topic.
